author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Bringing a beloved attraction to new heights takes vision, artistry, and innovation💺✨ #DisneyParks
Go behind the scenes of Soarin’ Across America and see how Imagineers, cast members, and musicians created this all-new adventure in a new episode of Disney Unscripted. Now on Disney Parks YouTube.

Take flight on an all-new adventure as Soarin’ Across America opened May 26 at EPCOT and coming soon to Disney California Adventure on July 2, 2026.

In this episode of Disney Unscripted, go behind the scenes with Walt Disney Imagineering and cast members across Walt Disney World Resort and Disneyland Resort for the latest reimagining of the iconic attraction featuring a brand-new journey across the United States to celebrate America's 250th anniversary.

From capturing stunning aerial footage over a tapestry of diverse American landscapes to crafting an all-new musical arrangement of the iconic Soarin’ score, see how filmmakers, musicians, and Imagineers worked together to bring this next chapter to life. You’ll also get an inside look at how each scene is designed and fine-tuned through ride testing to create the smooth, immersive sensation of flight.

Whether you’re a longtime fan or soaring for the first time, discover how Disney continues to elevate this beloved attraction with new technology, storytelling, and heart as Disney Celebrates America.

🎥 Watch more Disney Unscripted episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLflf8xbnbx671EAWfbq06i6S5EMqf7_i5

SUBSCRIBE: http://di.sn/6002ODIEQ

About Walt Disney World:
At Walt Disney World, you've got a whole fantastic world to celebrate in! With four spectacular theme parks and two water parks plus the most amazing shopping, dining, and recreation magic imaginable, it's no wonder all of life's special moments are made even more enjoyable when you celebrate at Walt Disney World.
